title: Easy Saber-toothed Tiger Coloring Page

author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Saber-toothed Tiger (Smilodon) lived during the Pleistocene epoch (Ice Age) and was characterized by its 7-inch curved canine teeth.
Saber-toothed Tiger was a robust predator built for pinning down large prey like bison and mammoths, rather than chasing them at high speeds.
